race.name: La Cicloturista Internacional de la Cerdanya

course_description.overview: International cyclosportive through the Cerdanya valley in the eastern Pyrenees, crossing between Spain and France via open valleys, secondary roads, and solitary mountain passes with spectacular panoramic views.[1][2]

key_segments.name: Collada de Toses
key_segments.description: Iconic Catalan Pyrenees pass featured in the route and Tour de France.[1]

key_segments.name: Col du Calvaire
key_segments.description: Emblematic French Pyrenees climb with unique landscapes and quiet roads.[1]

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Challenging high-mountain route with 2673m elevation gain over 145km medial distance, combining demanding climbs in a scenic border region.[1][2]

logistics.getting_there: Start near Palacio de Congresos y Deportes de Alp or Puigcerdà area; accessible via roads in Cerdanya valley.[2]
logistics.accommodation: Available in Puigcerdà and surrounding Cerdanya towns during summer cycling season.[1]
logistics.registration_details: Opens November 18, 2026 at 10:00; early bird 65€ until March 4, 2026, then 75€ until June 28, 85€ final week; prior participants 55€ in early November.[4]
logistics.bike_logistics: Standard road bike event; no specific transport noted.[2]
logistics.local Considerations: High altitude Pyrenees; event precedes Tour de France stage on same roads; non-competitive gran fondo format.[1][2][4]

final_verdict.one_liner: Spectacular Pyrenean cyclotourist ride with stunning valley views and iconic climbs across Spain-France border.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Road cyclists seeking high-mountain gran fondo experience with multiple distances in beautiful Cerdanya.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for premium organization, scenery, and value in a growing regional event.
pro_tips: Choose medial 145km for the queried distance with balanced challenge.
Register early November for discounts if prior participant.
Prepare for high altitude and climbs like Collada de Toses.
Combine with Tour de France stage watching two days later.
